title: Forward-Looking Active REtrieval augmented generation (FLARE)

defines.name: FLARE
defines.definition: A forward-looking active retrieval augmented generation method that iteratively predicts the next sentence, retrieves documents using that prediction when token confidence is low, and regenerates the sentence with the retrieved evidence.

problem: Standard retrieve-and-generate LMs retrieve only once from the input, which is insufficient for long-form generation with evolving information needs and can lead to hallucination or inappropriate retrieval.
